_comment: Muskelgruppen-Icons + Empty-State im Klar-&-Klinisch-Stil (Ink + Teal). Gruener Standard-Chroma ok.
style: Minimal flat anatomical icon, single subject centered, deep ink charcoal (#14201f) silhouette with a single cool teal (#0a6e66) highlight on the target muscle, clean Swiss clinical style, bold simple shapes that read clearly even at small size, no text, no background.

items.prompt: a pair of strong stylized human legs (thighs and quads) from the front, simple bold flat icon
a stylized male chest with pectoral muscles, front upper torso, simple bold flat icon
a stylized muscular back with a V-taper of the lats seen from behind, simple bold flat icon
stylized rounded shoulders and deltoid muscles, simple bold flat icon
a flexed arm showing a prominent biceps, simple bold flat icon
an extended arm highlighting the triceps on the back of the upper arm, simple bold flat icon
a stylized toned core with six-pack abs on a torso, simple bold flat icon
a clean minimal illustration of a tidy clipboard with a small upward trend line, calm and friendly, for an empty-state placeholder
